Get In Touch

Contact

For press inquiries, collaboration proposals, speaking invitations, workshop requests, or simply to say hello.

Classifieds

SEEKING

Collaborators for a research project exploring the intersection of poetic meter and neural oscillation. Must be comfortable with both LaTeX and line breaks.

OFFERING

Workshop: "Debugging Your Draft" — a two-hour session applying engineering debugging principles to poetry revision. Available for schools and writing groups.

AVAILABLE

Guest lectures on attention economics, educational technology ethics, or slam poetry as civic practice. Remote or in-person, Bay Area preferred.

NOTICE

Response time: 3–5 business days. All emails answered personally. No form letters. No PR representation. Direct line only.
